title: The Continuation of Tribal Warfare in Khur3san under cAbdallAh b. Khazim
description: under cAbdalldh b. Khdzim The cause, it is reported, was that those of the Banu Tamim in KhurIsin had aided cAbdallih b. Khazim against those of RabFFah who were there and in the fighting against Aws b. Thadlabah, and a number of them had been killed. Ibn KhAzim had defeated Aws b. Tha°labah and Khurasdn had completely submitted to him. When it had done so and no one disputed it with him, Ibn KhAzim treated Tamim harshly. He had assigned Herat to his son Muhammad, appointed him over it, made Bukayr b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
